assumptions: u(t,x) is Lebesgue integrable on B
S(t,x) is Bochner integrable on B
norm(S(t,x)) <= c u(t,x) almost everywhere on B

encoded_statement.first_inequality: norm(integral_B S(t,x) d^3x) <= integral_B norm(S(t,x)) d^3x
encoded_statement.second_inequality: integral_B norm(S(t,x)) d^3x <= c integral_B u(t,x) d^3x

blocked_promotions: Lean conditional integral bound -> unconditional directional-flow theorem
Lean conditional integral bound -> detector realization
Lean conditional integral bound -> empirical confirmation
Lean conditional integral bound -> E equals m c cubed
